flashcards.front: What are the four types in Chomsky Hierarchy?
What type of grammar requires rules of form α → β where |α| ≤ |β|?
Give an example of Type-2 grammar application
flashcards.back: Programming language syntax in compilers using BNF notation
No restrictions on production rules (unrestricted grammars)

flashcards.front: Which grammar type is used for natural language processing?
What automaton corresponds to Type-0 grammars?
What is the key difference between Type-2 and Type-3 productions?
flashcards.back: Type-2 allows single non-terminal on left, Type-3 restricts to A → aB or A → a

flashcards.front: Name a real-world application of regular grammars
flashcards.back: Lexical analysis in compilers using regular expressions

flashcards.front: What mathematical concept models Context-Free Grammars?
Which grammar type is the most restrictive?
What problem can't regular grammars handle?
